meta.title: 9 Days Golden Triangle + Best of Kashmir from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: 9-day tour with Delhi, Taj Mahal, Jaipur and best of Kashmir including Gulmarg, Pahalgam and Dal Lake, domestic flight. From RM3998 per person.
meta.keywords: 9 Days Golden Triangle + Best of Kashmir from Malaysia, India tour package, North India tour package Malaysia, Dhesu travel

hero.title: 9 Days, Triangle & Best Kashmir.
hero.titleAccent: The Icons and the Full Kashmir Valley.
hero.intro: The complete combination. The Golden Triangle of Delhi, Agra and Jaipur, then a fuller Kashmir leg taking in Dal Lake, Gulmarg and Pahalgam. Nine days of India's greatest monuments and the best of the valley.

breadcrumb.label: 9 Days Golden Triangle + Best of Kashmir

hero.heroImageAlt: Golden Triangle and best of Kashmir valley tour

overview.heading: 9 Days Golden Triangle + Best of Kashmir: The Full Picture
body: This 9 day tour is the most complete combination of the Golden Triangle and Kashmir. After Delhi, the Taj Mahal and Jaipur, you fly north for a fuller Kashmir leg: Dal Lake and a houseboat night, the Mughal gardens, the Gulmarg gondola and the alpine valleys of Pahalgam.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, the trip includes the domestic flight and a private vehicle with driver guide throughout. The extra day over the 8 day version means both Gulmarg and Pahalgam are included, for a deeper experience of the valley alongside the iconic monuments of the plains.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: The Golden Triangle Icons
items.body: Delhi, the Taj Mahal at sunrise, Agra Fort and Jaipur's forts and palaces, the classic North India trio.

items.title: Gulmarg & Pahalgam
items.body: Both of Kashmir's great mountain destinations: the Gulmarg gondola and the alpine valleys of Pahalgam, included at a relaxed pace.

items.title: Dal Lake Houseboat
items.body: A shikara ride and a houseboat night on Srinagar's Dal Lake, framed by the Mughal gardens and snow peaks.

days.title: Arrive Delhi
days.description: Met at the airport and transferred to your hotel.

days.title: Delhi, Drive to Agra
days.description: Old and New Delhi, then drive to Agra.

days.title: Taj Mahal, Drive to Jaipur
days.description: Sunrise Taj, Agra Fort, then to Jaipur via Fatehpur Sikri.

days.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
days.description: A full day in the Pink City.

days.title: Jaipur to Delhi, Fly to Srinagar
days.description: Travel to Delhi and fly to Srinagar, transfer to your houseboat.

days.title: Srinagar Sightseeing
days.description: The Mughal gardens and old city.

days.title: Gulmarg Excursion
days.description: Drive to Gulmarg for the gondola and mountain scenery.

days.title: Pahalgam Excursion
days.description: A full day in the valleys of Pahalgam.

days.title: Depart Srinagar
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: The Complete Icons-and-Valley Tour
whyBook.body: Combining the Golden Triangle with the full Kashmir valley takes careful routing and a domestic flight. We handle the logistics so both Gulmarg and Pahalgam fit alongside the monuments. Dhesu has run North India tours for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Golden Triangle & Best of Kashmir Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 9 day package is the most complete combination of the Golden Triangle and Kashmir. After the Taj Mahal and Jaipur, the fuller Kashmir leg includes both Gulmarg and Pahalgam alongside Dal Lake.

The domestic flight links the two regions, and a private vehicle with driver guide keeps everything smooth.

It is ideal for travellers who want both the iconic monuments and a proper experience of the Kashmir valley, not just a quick visit.

sections.heading: Why the 9 Day Version
sections.body:
The 8 day Golden Triangle plus Kashmir includes one mountain excursion; this 9 day version includes both Gulmarg and Pahalgam, for a fuller experience of the valley.

The extra day means a more relaxed pace in Kashmir, with time to enjoy the gondola, the alpine valleys and Dal Lake, after the grandeur of the Golden Triangle.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Delhi and Srinagar Airports (DEL / SXR). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: What does the 9 day version add over the 8 day?
items.answer: The 9 day package includes both Gulmarg and Pahalgam in Kashmir, plus Srinagar, for a fuller and more relaxed valley experience, while the 8 day version includes one mountain excursion. Both cover the full Golden Triangle.

items.question: Is the domestic flight included?
items.answer: Yes. The package includes the domestic flight from Delhi to Srinagar, linking the Golden Triangle with Kashmir. International flights are not included.

items.question: What is the best time for this trip?
items.answer: April to October suits Kashmir, while October to March is best for the Golden Triangle. Spring and autumn offer good weather in both regions, making them the best windows for this combined tour.
